_schema.description: Coverage universe for Furton Coverage. FROZEN at Merge Gate 1 (2026-07-08): the 10 entries with candidate=true are the locked roster. Changes now require a dated note (PLAN §5). The 9 candidate=false entries are the runner-ups from Session 1's original 15 — KEPT (not deleted) as re-promotable alternates.
_schema.specialty: AI-INFRASTRUCTURE desk (the deep, narrow complement to Furton Research's broad 30-name Dow screen), plus 2 deliberate decorrelators. Selection rule Nick set: 'add no name we cannot grade' — i.e. every roster name must put QUANTITATIVE forward guidance in its 8-K EX-99.1 press release (guidance-graded, EDGAR-only method). Correlation call (which 2 decorrelators) was delegated to Session 2; see notes/_inbox/edgar_report.md §7.

fields.cik: 10-digit zero-padded SEC CIK. Survivors resolved by Session 1 (2026-07-08); the 4 AI-infra adds (AMD/AVGO/CRWD/AMZN) resolved + live-validated by Session 2.
fields.company: Legal name as it appears in the SEC ticker map.
fields.typical_reporting_months: Months the company usually files its quarterly earnings 8-K.
fields.key_kpi_concepts: XBRL us-gaap/dei concept tags + company-specific KPIs. '(KPI)' = a management metric that is NOT in companyfacts' non-dimensional facts (see companyfacts_caveat) and must be extracted from the 8-K press release (Session 3/7).
fields.dow_member: CONFIRMED against the live Dow 30 on 2026-07-08. Final roster overlap = NVDA + CRM + AMZN = 3 (at the PLAN §2 <=3 cap).
fields.guidance_status: AUTHORITATIVE ruling from Session 2's live-EDGAR validation: guidable (quantitative guidance in the EX-99.1 release) | call_only (guidance verbal on the call, not in the filing — HARD EXCLUDE) | out_of_scope.
fields.basis: gaap | non_gaap — the basis the company GUIDES on. Drives score.py's refuse-to-cross-bases rule (PLAN §3). Confirmed at the gate: AMZN and DE are GAAP; the other 8 roster names are non-GAAP.
fields.candidate: true = frozen roster (the 10). false = cut / alternate (kept for possible re-promotion).
fields.one_liner: Why this name earns (or lost) a coverage slot.
fields.cut_note: On candidate=false entries only: why it was cut and its alternate rank.

_schema.resolver: Session 1 CIKs via sec.gov/files/company_tickers.json; AI-infra adds validated live by Session 2 (data cached in data/raw/, reproducible).
alternates_in_priority_order: META (top alternate — swap for CRWD for the mega-cap ads read)
NOW (ServiceNow — validated gradable by Session 2 §7b; no full entry here, add if promoted)

excluded_do_not_re_add.note: These marquee 'AI desk' names are UNGRADEABLE by our guidance-graded, EDGAR-only method. Validated by Session 2 against each latest EX-99.1 (edgar_report.md §7a) / §3. Documented so no later session wastes time re-adding them.
excluded_do_not_re_add.MSFT: call_only — segment guidance is verbal CFO commentary on the call, none in the release.
excluded_do_not_re_add.GOOGL: no_guidance — Alphabet gives essentially no written forward guidance.
excluded_do_not_re_add.AAPL: call_only — dropped formal guidance in 2020; no outlook section in the release.
excluded_do_not_re_add.TSM: out_of_scope — foreign private issuer, files 20-F/6-K (IFRS), no Item 2.02 8-K for the spine to parse.
excluded_do_not_re_add.V: call_only — Visa's 8-K press release has no guidance section; outlook is verbal on the call (edgar_report.md §3). Kept as a candidate=false entry below with the full rationale.

_schema.companyfacts_caveat: Session 2 structural finding: SEC companyfacts returns HEADLINE (non-dimensional) financials ONLY — segment/product/KPI detail (NVDA Data Center, LLY product revenue, DE segment sales, PANW NGS ARR, CRWD ARR, AWS revenue, etc.) is NOT in companyfacts and must come from 8-K press-release extraction (Session 3/7). Model = headline financials from companyfacts + KPIs from the release.
_schema.downstream_notes: EX-99 vs EX-99.1: most file the release as EX-99.1; LLY and GE file bare EX-99 (edgar.py falls back but still fails loud on ambiguity). On print day pass force=True to edgar.py's earnings_8k()/submissions() or the fresh 8-K is served stale from cache.

universe.one_liner: Anchor of the AI-infra book — guides next-quarter revenue + gross margin + opex in the release; head of the NVDA->AMD->AVGO->MU supply-chain cross-read and a Furton Research Dow cross-comparison.

key_kpi_concepts: segment: Data Center / Client / Gaming / Embedded (KPI)
universe.one_liner: The #2 AI accelerator and a direct NVDA read-through — guides next-quarter revenue as a +/- band and non-GAAP gross margin in the release (latest: ~$11.2B +/- $300M, ~56% GM). Validated live by Session 2 (EX-99.1).

AI networking + custom-silicon (XPU) complement to the GPU names; guides next-quarter revenue + non-GAAP op-income% + adj EBITDA. Off-cycle (Nov FYE) staggers well. XBRL history only from ~2017 (post-Avago entity) — flag for build_model.py.

The memory/HBM leg of the AI-compute supply chain and an off-calendar (Mar/Jun/Sep/Dec) reporter filling the gaps the Dec-FY names miss; guides next-quarter revenue, gross margin and EPS in the release.
Enterprise-software / applied-AI (Agentforce) anchor with textbook written guidance (full-year + next-quarter revenue and EPS, plus cRPO and margin); one of the 3 allowed Dow overlaps.
The platform-security leg of the software complex — rich written guidance (full-year + next-quarter revenue, NGS ARR, billings, EPS); July FYE staggers it off the crowded calendar-quarter cluster.

Cloud-native security with a textbook Q+FY guidance TABLE (ARR, revenue, non-GAAP EPS) — the cleanest guide on the board. Shortest history (IPO 2019) but clean; off-cycle (Mar/Jun/Sep/Dec). Validated live by Session 2.

The ONLY hyperscaler that writes its guidance — next-quarter net-sales range + operating-income range on a GAAP basis (latest: net sales $194-199B, op income $20-24B). AWS-capex read-through to NVDA/AVGO. 3rd of 3 Dow overlaps (replaces UNH).

key_kpi_concepts: product revenue: Mounjaro / Zepbound / Verzenio (KPI, press-release-sourced — not in companyfacts)
universe.one_liner: Deliberate DECORRELATOR #1 (pharma) — guides full-year revenue and both reported & non-GAAP EPS in the release. Keeps the scorecard from being one lucky AI-capex run; cleanly gradable. Files the release as bare EX-99 (not .1).

key_kpi_concepts: segment sales: Production & Precision Ag / Small Ag & Turf / Construction & Forestry (KPI)
universe.one_liner: Deliberate DECORRELATOR #2 (industrials/ag) — guides full-year NET INCOME as a plain GAAP dollar range, the least basis-ambiguous call on the board. Cyclical exposure uncorrelated with AI capex.

key_kpi_concepts: total costs and expenses (KPI, guided as a range)
capital expenditures (KPI, guided as a range)
universe.cut_note: TOP ALTERNATE (rank 1). Strong AI-capex read (guides next-Q revenue range + FY expense/capex ranges) but kept the book tech-heavy without adding the supply-chain cross-read AMD/AVGO/CRWD do. Swap in for CRWD if the mega-cap ads read is preferred (edgar_report.md §7c).
universe.one_liner: Guides next-quarter total-revenue range PLUS full-year expense and capex ranges — an unusually gradable multi-line guide and a mega-cap advertising/AI-capex read.

universe.cut_note: ALTERNATE (rank 2). Cut for the AI-infra focus; cleanly gradable (guides next-Q revenue, operating margin, EPS in the shareholder letter / EX-99.1). Re-promotable.
universe.one_liner: Guides next-quarter revenue, operating margin and EPS in the shareholder letter (8-K EX-99.1); stopped guiding subscriber adds in 2025.

key_kpi_concepts: installed base of da Vinci systems (KPI)
universe.cut_note: ALTERNATE (rank 3). Cut for the AI-infra focus; distinctive non-financial KPI (procedure growth) makes it a good re-promotion if the desk broadens.
universe.one_liner: Guides full-year procedure growth, gross margin and opex growth in the release.

universe.cut_note: Cut for roster fit (already have CRM + PANW + CRWD in software/security). Session 2 upgraded my 'verify' prior: ORCL DOES guide in writing (FY revenue ~$90B + non-GAAP EPS ~$8.05) -> guidable, not call-only.
universe.one_liner: Off-calendar (May FYE) enterprise software / OCI cloud; guides FY revenue + non-GAAP EPS in the release.

universe.cut_note: Cut for the AI-infra focus; also freed a Dow-overlap slot (AMZN took the 3rd Dow seat). Cleanly gradable (guides FY adjusted EPS + revenue) — re-promotable healthcare decorrelator.
universe.one_liner: Guides full-year adjusted EPS and revenue with a re-affirm/raise cadence every quarter.

universe.cut_note: Cut for roster fit (DE covers the industrial decorrelator slot). Guidable but note the post-spin GE Aerospace XBRL history breaks pre-2024 (Session 2) — a model caveat if promoted. Files bare EX-99 (not .1).
universe.one_liner: GE Aerospace guides full-year adjusted EPS, free cash flow and revenue growth in the release.

universe.cut_note: Cut for the AI-infra focus. Session 2 resolved my 'verify' prior: SBUX has RESUMED (and even raised) formal written guidance after the FY25 suspension -> guidable.
universe.one_liner: Consumer/restaurants read with a distinctive comp-sales KPI; guides comp sales + EPS in the release.

universe.cut_note: Cut for the AI-infra focus. Cleanly gradable defensive-staples decorrelator (guides FY organic revenue growth + core cc-EPS) — re-promotable.
universe.one_liner: Guides full-year organic revenue growth and core constant-currency EPS in the release.

universe.cut_note: HARD EXCLUDE — Session 2 confirmed Visa's 8-K EX-99.1 has NO guidance section; the net-revenue/EPS-growth outlook is given verbally on the call, which EDGAR does not carry. Ungradeable by our method. Do NOT re-add (same disqualifier as MSFT/GOOGL/AAPL, edgar_report.md §3).
universe.one_liner: Payments-network exposure with rich volume KPIs, but guidance is call-only -> cannot be scored on the EDGAR-only method.
